command: Set-Location 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent'; $logFile = 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media_bridge_error.log'; Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\Users\Revexn\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\python.exe' -ArgumentList 'media-pipeline/media_bridge.py' -RedirectStandardError $logFile -WindowStyle Normal -PassThru | ForEach-Object { $pid_new = $_.Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 25; $proc = Get-Process -Id $pid_new -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($proc) { Write-Output "SUCCESS: media_bridge.py restarted with NEW PID=$pid_new"; Write-Output "Log file: $logFile"; if (Test-Path $logFile) { $logContent = Get-Content $logFile -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($logContent) { Write-Output "=== STDERR LOG (first 2000 chars) ==="; Write-Output $logContent.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(2000, $logContent.Length)) } else { Write-Output 'No stderr output yet (log empty)' } } else { Write-Output 'Log file not created yet' }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== Check input/ for San.jpg ==='; $sanPath = 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\input\San.jpg'; if (Test-Path $sanPath) { Write-Output 'San.jpg STILL in input/ (not processed yet)' } else { Write-Output 'San.jpg GONE from input/ (processed or moved!)' } } else { Write-Output "FAILED: Process $pid_new not running after 25s" } }
description: Restart media_bridge.py with stderr logging and check San.jpg processing
